svg.title: MindCapsule system architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture showing perception plane, memory kernel, AI intelligence, safety systems, and interfaces for elderly cognitive care with RuView WiFi sensing.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MindCapsule family dashboard and elder UI')
sendPrompt('How does MindCapsule emergency alerting and 911 integration work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the narrow AI model fine-tuned for cognitive decline in MindCapsule')
g.text: ICA · PCA · vital fusion · anomaly reasoning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MindCapsule detect falls and monitor vital signs for elderly patients?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the AgentMemoryEngine and Nesting Doll memory in MindCapsule')
g.text: Nesting Doll · identity vector · AOF persistence

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MindCapsule protect patient privacy with local-first architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does RuView WiFi CSI work as a silent passive sensor in MindCapsule?')
sendPrompt('Is the camera optional in MindCapsule? How does it compare to RuView?')
sendPrompt('What future sensors will MindCapsule support beyond WiFi CSI?')
